overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing an NCPD officer patrolling a rainy, neon-lit urban street at night. The character walks along a green-carpeted sidewalk under an overpass, passing vending machines and storefronts with distinct cyberpunk aesthetics and lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: NCPD officer walking steadily along the green carpeted path with back to camera, patrolling under the overpass

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass structure spanning across the walkway
bright green carpeted pedestrian path with white markings
green metal railings separating walkway from street
rain-soaked multi-lane road with reflective surface
tall concrete wall with graffiti on the right side of path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following an NCPD officer walking under a massive highway overpass. The path is covered with distinctive bright green artificial turf, bordered by metal railings on the left separating it from the wet asphalt street where sparse traffic passes by. The area is sheltered from the rain but illuminated by mixed neon and street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with commercial posters and street lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing along the green path, approaching an intersection with traffic lights visible ahead

entered.detail: colorful vertical posters and advertisements plastered on the wall
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing on the street

segments.scene_description: The officer continues walking along the green carpeted sidewalk as the overpass recedes behind. The right wall features colorful commercial posters and graffiti, while the street to the left shows crosswalk markings and sparse vehicle traffic. The environment transitions from fully covered to partially open sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with vending machines and storefronts

events.description: camera swings around from behind to front of character, revealing the NCPD officer's face and rifle

agents.ego_description: character continues walking as camera circles to show front view, holding a futuristic rifle at ready

entered.detail: illuminated beverage and snack vending machines with glowing displays
wooden counter with green stools in front of a shop
small potted plants placed near building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera dynamically circles around the character, transitioning from a rear view to a front-facing perspective. The officer walks past illuminated vending machines and a storefront counter with green stools. The environment features more prominent neon lighting and commercial elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with pedestrians and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking toward the camera while passing other pedestrians and storefronts with bright neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and red pants walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: bright pink and blue neon signs advertising businesses
various pedestrians walking along the sidewalk and street
gaming arcade cabinets with illuminated screens

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the officer walking toward the camera through a more populated area of the commercial district. Other pedestrians appear in the background, and bright neon signs illuminate the storefronts. The character passes arcade machines and vending machines while maintaining a patrol posture with rifle in hand.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that tracks an NCPD officer as he moves from the sheltered gloom of a highway overpass into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins with a rear view of the officer walking along a bright green artificial turf sidewalk, bordered by metal railings and wet asphalt under the massive concrete structure. As the overpass recedes and the sky opens up, the camera glides past walls adorned with colorful graffiti and commercial posters. The perspective then dynamically circles around the character to a front-facing view, shifting the focus toward illuminated vending machines and a storefront with green stools. Finally, the officer walks directly toward the camera through a more populated area, passing arcade machines and bright neon signs while maintaining a patrol posture with his rifle in hand.
